Talent & Media · International pipeline

Join the Next Generation of Rwandan Artists.

Portfolio development, mentorship, paid commissions, and a route into our global art store — for dancers, visual artists, and media creators.

Apply Now Meet Current Talent

Performance Snapshots

Dance and stage energy in motion.

Auto-animated snapshots of performances and rehearsals to make the talent program feel alive.

Talent Pathway

From application to real creative income.

A clear four-phase journey for international visibility and market access.

Phase 1

Apply Online

Create an applicant account and submit your category, skills, and motivation.
Phase 2

Get Visibility

Approved talent receives profile exposure and guidance from senior mentors.
Phase 3

Reach The Market

Top participants connect to commissions and storefront opportunities worldwide.
Phase 4

Stay Connected

Use platform messaging and notifications for follow-ups and next steps.

Upload Guidelines

  • Images: JPG, PNG, WEBP (Max 10MB)
  • Videos: MP4, MOV (Max 50MB recommended)
You can select multiple images.
